info.title: Listenarr API
info.description:
REST API for Listenarr audiobook management and automation.
Versioning: URL segment format `/api/v{version}/...` (default version: v1).

Authentication quick start:
1. Click `Authorize` and enter one credential (you do not need all schemes).
2. Session token flow:
   - Call `POST /api/v{version}/account/login` with `{ "username": "...", "password": "...", "rememberMe": false }`.
   - Copy `sessionToken` from the 200 response when `authType` is `session`.
   - Use `SessionBearer` (`Bearer <sessionToken>`) or `SessionTokenHeader` (`<sessionToken>`).
3. API key flow:
   - Listenarr auto-generates an API key on first run.
   - Read the current key from `GET /api/v{version}/configuration/startupconfig` (trusted-network/auth redaction rules apply).
   - Rotate the key with `POST /api/v{version}/configuration/apikey/regenerate` (Administrator required).
   - `POST /api/v{version}/configuration/apikey/generate-initial` is localhost bootstrap only and typically returns 409 after setup.
   - Use `ApiKeyHeader` (`<apiKey>`) or `ApiKeyAuthorization` (`ApiKey <apiKey>`).

post.summary: Authenticate a user and return a session token.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/account/login`.

requestBody.description: Login credentials and optional remember-me flag.

200.description: Login succeeded. Returns session token and auth type.

429.description: Too many failed attempts. Retry after the indicated number of seconds.

post.summary: End the current session and invalidate the session token.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/account/logout`.

get.summary: Get the current user's authentication status and identity.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/account/me`.

get.summary: List all administrator accounts.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/account/admins`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary: Issue a new CSRF antiforgery token for the current session.
get.description: The token must be sent as a request header on subsequent state-changing requests.

get.summary: Get all API configurations.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/configuration/apis`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.summary: Save an API configuration.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/configuration/apis`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary: Get a specific API configuration by ID.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/configuration/apis/{id}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

delete.summary: Delete an API configuration by ID.
delete.description: Endpoint `DELETE /api/v1/configuration/apis/{id}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary:
Lightweight diagnostics to help debug bot startup issues in production.
Returns whether the bot directory and index.js exist and whether `node` is available.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/discord/diagnostics`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

requestBody.description: Request containing the audiobook ID to search for.

post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/download/send`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

requestBody.description: The search result to download, optional download client ID, and optional audiobook ID to associate.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/download/queue`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

delete.description: Endpoint `DELETE /api/v1/download/queue/{downloadId}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

parameters.name: downloadClientId
parameters.description: Optional download client ID to target.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: When true, remove the database record even if the download client removal fails.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.summary: Re-queue a completed download for reprocessing (file import).
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/download/reprocess/{downloadId}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

requestBody.description: Optional filters: include already-processed downloads and maximum age.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary: Browse the server file system. Returns directories and files for a given path, or root drives if no path is provided.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/filesystem/browse`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Directory path to browse. Leave empty to list root drives/directories.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/filesystem/validate`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The absolute directory path to validate.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary: Check whether two paths reside on the same volume. Moving files across volumes will break hardlinks.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/filesystem/check-volume`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary: Get all history entries, ordered by most recent first.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of entries to skip for pagination.

parameters.description: Age threshold in days (default 90). Entries older than this are deleted.

post.summary:
Import indexers from a Prowlarr instance.
By default this imports audiobook-related indexers (category 3000/3030),
but a configured tag filter overrides that selection.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/indexers/prowlarr/import`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

requestBody.description: Prowlarr server URL and API key.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/indexers/{id}/test`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

post.summary: Test an indexer configuration without saving it. Useful for validating settings before creating an indexer.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/indexers/test`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/indexers/{id}/debug-search`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

put.description: Endpoint `PUT /api/v1/indexers/{id}/toggle`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

requestBody.description: Audiobook metadata and optional destination root override.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary: Get all audiobooks in the library using a slim list payload.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary: Look up an audiobook by its ASIN.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/library/by-asin/{asin}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/library/{id}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

put.summary: Update an existing audiobook's metadata and settings. Supports partial updates — only non-null fields are applied.
put.description: Endpoint `PUT /api/v1/library/{id}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

requestBody.description: Fields to update (null fields are left unchanged).

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

delete.summary: Delete an audiobook from the library, including its cached cover image.
delete.description: Endpoint `DELETE /api/v1/library/{id}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

parameters.name: deleteFiles
parameters.description: When true, delete all files within the audiobook folder when it can be done safely; otherwise fall back to tracked audiobook files before removing the library record.

parameters.name: deleteFolder
parameters.description: When true, also delete the audiobook folder when it can be done safely.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

get.summary: Get all external identifiers (ASIN, ISBN, Goodreads ID, etc.) for an audiobook.
get.description: Endpoint `GET /api/v1/library/{id}/identifiers`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

put.summary: Replace all external identifiers for an audiobook in a single operation.
put.description: Endpoint `PUT /api/v1/library/{id}/identifiers`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

requestBody.description: New set of identifiers. Existing identifiers will be removed and replaced.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.summary: Re-fetch metadata for an audiobook from upstream sources (Audible / Audnexus) and update the local record.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/library/{id}/rescan-metadata`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

post.summary:
Scan the filesystem for files belonging to this audiobook, extract metadata (ffprobe) and persist AudiobookFile records.
Optional body: { path: "C:\\some\\folder" } to scan a specific folder instead of the configured output path.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/library/{id}/scan`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

parameters.name: jobId

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.summary: Re-enqueue a previously failed or completed scan job for retry.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/library/scan/requeue/{jobId}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/library/rename/preview`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/library/{id}/rename`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/library/manual-import`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

delete.description: Endpoint `DELETE /api/v1/rootfolders/{id}`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.summary:
Perform a combined metadata and indexer search using a structured request body.
Supports simple (metadata-only) and advanced (indexer) search modes.
post.description: Endpoint `POST /api/v1/search`. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

parameters.name: simplified
parameters.description: When true (default), return simplified metadata for the "Add New" workflow.

requestBody.description: Search request JSON with query, mode, region, and optional filters.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

parameters.name: enrichedOnly
parameters.description: When true, return only metadata results that have enriched data.

parameters.name: candidateLimit
parameters.description: Maximum candidates to consider before ranking (default 50).

parameters.name: containmentMode
parameters.description: Matching strictness: Relaxed or Strict (default Relaxed).

parameters.name: requireAuthorAndPublisher
parameters.description: When true, only return results with both author and publisher.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

post.summary: Run ffprobe against a local audio file and return the raw JSON output.
post.description: Restricted to local or admin callers. Only absolute, local file paths are accepted. Authentication is required when enabled in startup configuration.

requestBody.description: Request body containing the absolute path to the file to scan.

200.description: ffprobe output including parsed JSON, exit code, stdout, and stderr.

400.description: File path missing, relative, or non-local.

404.description: File not found at the specified path.

403.description: Request is authenticated but not authorized.

rememberMe.description: Whether to issue a long-lived session token.

Listenarr.Api.Controllers.LoginRequest.description: Request payload used to authenticate a user.

includeProcessed.description: Include downloads that have already been processed

maxAge.description: Maximum age of downloads to include (default: 30 days)

SessionBearer.description:
Use `Authorization: Bearer <sessionToken>`.
Get `sessionToken` from `POST /api/v{version}/account/login` using username/password credentials.

SessionTokenHeader.description:
Use `X-Session-Token: <sessionToken>`.
Get `sessionToken` from `POST /api/v{version}/account/login` using username/password credentials.
SessionTokenHeader.name: X-Session-Token

ApiKeyHeader.description:
Use `X-Api-Key: <apiKey>`.
API keys are auto-generated on first run.
Read the current key from `GET /api/v{version}/configuration/startupconfig` (trusted-network/auth redaction rules apply).
Regenerate with `POST /api/v{version}/configuration/apikey/regenerate` (Administrator required).
ApiKeyHeader.name: X-Api-Key

ApiKeyAuthorization.description:
Use `Authorization: ApiKey <apiKey>`.
API keys are auto-generated on first run.
Read the current key from `GET /api/v{version}/configuration/startupconfig` (trusted-network/auth redaction rules apply).
Regenerate with `POST /api/v{version}/configuration/apikey/regenerate` (Administrator required).
ApiKeyAuthorization.name: Authorization

tags.name: Library
tags.description: Audiobook CRUD, scanning, file moves, bulk operations, and manual import

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Multi-API audiobook search, intelligent search, and direct Audible lookups

tags.name: Metadata
tags.description: ASIN/ISBN metadata lookup and author search

tags.name: Downloads
tags.description: Download queue, send to client, reprocessing, and download record management

tags.name: History
tags.description: Event history browsing, filtering, and cleanup

tags.name: Indexers
tags.description: Indexer CRUD, testing, and Prowlarr import

tags.name: Quality Profiles
tags.description: Quality profile CRUD and result scoring

tags.name: Download Clients
tags.description: Download client CRUD and connectivity testing

tags.name: Root Folders
tags.description: Root folder CRUD for audiobook storage paths

tags.name: Remote Path Mappings
tags.description: Path mapping CRUD for cross-system file path translation

tags.name: File System
tags.description: Directory browsing, path validation, and volume checks

tags.name: System
tags.description: System info, health checks, logs, FFmpeg, and admin tools

tags.name: Images
tags.description: Cover image retrieval and cache management

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Authentication, user management, and CSRF tokens
